name: Session Start
description: Provider session initialization from process spawn through thread open to ready state

events.session.start.initiated: Starting {{provider.name}} session for thread {{thread.id}} ({{runtime.mode}} mode, model: {{model}}, cwd: {{cwd}}, resume: {{has.resume.cursor}})
events.session.ready: Thread {{thread.id}} ready: provider {{provider.thread.id}}, account {{account.type}}, spark {{spark.enabled}}, took {{duration.ms}}ms

scenarios.description: Resume failed but recovered by starting fresh thread

events.session.thread.resume.fallback: Thread {{thread.id}}: Resume of {{resume.thread.id}} failed: {{error.message}}, falling back
events.session.thread.open.resolved: Thread {{thread.id}}: Fresh provider thread {{provider.thread.id}} opened via {{method}}
events.session.ready: Thread {{thread.id}} ready after fallback: provider {{provider.thread.id}}, account {{account.type}}, took {{duration.ms}}ms
